bakery_items.name: Dumbake Signature Fudgy Brookies
bakery_items.description: A heavenly, soft-baked fusion of a chocolate chip cookie and a rich fudgy brownie. Dumbake's original crowd-pleaser!

bakery_items.name: Nutella Sea Salt Brookies
bakery_items.description: Our signature gooey brookies swirled with pure Nutella and topped with flaky Maldon sea salt.

bakery_items.name: Lotus Biscoff Brookies
bakery_items.description: Gooey cookie-brownie hybrid bar topped generously with smooth Lotus Biscoff cookie spread.

bakery_items.name: Classic Chocolate Fudge Brownies
bakery_items.description: Rich, intense dark chocolate brownies with a perfectly glossy, paper-thin crinkle crust.

bakery_items.name: Walnut Fudge Brownies
bakery_items.description: Ultra-fudgy chocolate brownie loaded with roasted premium walnut pieces.

bakery_items.name: Overloaded Biscoff Brownies
bakery_items.description: Decadent dark chocolate brownie slab filled with melted cookie butter swirls.

bakery_items.name: Ishika's Handcrafted Mango Cake (Seasonal)
bakery_items.description: Light sponge cake layered with fresh local Ranchi mango pulp and dairy-whipped cream.

bakery_items.name: Dumbake Rose Celebration Cake
bakery_items.description: Elegant double-layered custom cake decorated with pretty pink rose icing and filled with milk chocolate ganache.

bakery_items.name: Belgian Truffle Dream Cake
bakery_items.description: Decadent five-layer chocolate cake layered with smooth dark Belgian chocolate ganache.

bakery_items.name: Minimalist Pastel Bento Cake
bakery_items.description: Cute 250g lunchbox cake in pastel pink with personalized text, perfect for mini celebrations.

bakery_items.name: Dumbake Red Velvet Cupcakes
bakery_items.description: Vibrant red velvet sponge topped with a rich, velvety vanilla cream cheese frosting swirl.

bakery_items.name: Nutella Dream Cupcakes
bakery_items.description: Rich chocolate cupcakes filled with liquid Nutella and decorated with chocolate buttercream.

bakery_items.name: Lotus Biscoff Cupcakes
bakery_items.description: Vanilla cupcake with a biscoff cookie butter core and whipped cookie butter cream.

bakery_items.name: Chunky Chocolate Chip Cookie Box
bakery_items.description: Box of 4 thick, bakery-style cookies packed with dark chocolate chunks and baked golden.

bakery_items.name: Lotus Biscoff Cheesecake Pastry
bakery_items.description: Silky smooth baked cheesecake slice topped with Lotus Biscoff cookie spread.

bakery_items.name: Nutella Hazelnut Pastry Slice
bakery_items.description: Moist chocolate sponge slice layered with premium Nutella hazelnut cream.

bakery_items.name: Dumbake Signature Hamper Box
bakery_items.description: A gorgeous pink gifting box containing 2 signature brookies, 2 brownies, and 2 cupcakes.

bakery_items.name: Assorted Gourmet Cookie Box
bakery_items.description: Elegant white box loaded with choco-chip, double chocolate, and red velvet premium cookies.

reviews.comment: Dumbake Signature Fudgy Brookies are out of this world! Pure chocolate bliss.
Belgian Truffle Dream Cake is decadent, highly recommend it.
Nutella Sea Salt Brookies have the perfect balance of sweet and salty.
Classic Chocolate Fudge Brownies were a bit too sweet for me, but texture was great.
Dumbake Signature Fudgy Brookies are the best thing I have ever tasted! Extremely rich and fudgy!
Awesome bakery! Love the ambiance and packaging.
